name: RenetJapanGroup,Inc.
summary: RenetJapanGroup,Inc. engages in Internet reuse and small home appliance recycling businesses in Japan. The company offers used books, CDs, DVDs, game software, branded goods, and precious metals under the NET OFF brand. It also provides used small electronic devices, etc. under the ReNet.jp brand In addition, the company engages in vehicle sales, leasing, and microfinance businesses. RenetJapanGroup,Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
